# Summary

Describe the change in 2-5 bullet points.

-
-

## Type of Change

*Please select the relevant type:*

- [ ] `type: feat` (New feature)
- [ ] `type: fix` (Bug fix)
- [ ] `type: refactor` (Code improvement)
- [ ] `type: test` (Test updates only)
- [ ] `type: docs` (Documentation only)
- [ ] `type: chore` (Maintenance/Tooling)

## Scope (Areas Affected)

*Check all that apply. This maps to `area:` labels.*

- [ ] `area: domain` (Business logic, invariants)
- [ ] `area: application` (Handlers, orchestration)
- [ ] `area: infrastructure` (Persistence, outbox/inbox)
- [ ] `area: web` (API, middleware)
- [ ] `area: architecture-tests` (Guard rules, DSL)
- [ ] `area: docs` (ADRs, standards)
- [ ] `area: unit-tests`
- [ ] `area: integration-tests`
- [ ] `area: e2e-tests`
- [ ] `area: template-tests`

## Why

Why is this change needed? (Reference ADRs if applicable)

## Related Work

- Closes #
- Related ADR:
- Related Test Plan:

## Verification

*Confirm these actions have been taken:*

- [ ] Failing test written first (TDD)
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Architecture tests pass
- [ ] Documentation updated/added
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
- [ ] Naming is consistent (Domain/Application/Infra)

## Reviewer Notes

Highlight anything that needs special attention or specific trade-offs made.

## Risks / Follow-up

List risks or follow-up technical debt tasks.
